title: Marvell Technology Q2 2022 Earnings Preview: Can the Earnings Streak Continue?
text: Marvell Technology is a fabless designer and marketer of analog, mixed-signal, and digital signal processing integrated circuits. MRVL shares faced significant headwinds in 2022, declining over 40% year-to-date while substantially underperforming the broader market. Over the preceding month, the stock gained 3%, still lagging the S&P 500's 4% advance. The company trades at a 30.5X forward P/E ratio, representing a 4% premium to its sector. This valuation level carries a Style Score of D for Value, though it remains below the five-year median of 44.2X. Analysts anticipated exceptional growth metrics: 64% Y/Y uptick in quarterly earnings alongside projected revenue of $1.5 billion, reflecting 41% year-over-year growth. Marvell demonstrated consistent outperformance, having exceeded earnings estimates for five consecutive quarters and revenue estimates for six consecutive periods. Following its most recent earnings release, shares surged nearly 13%. The company carried a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell) designation with an overall VGM Score of C.
